QuickBooks reviews

Support took too long

I waited several days for billing support and still had to explain the issue again.

February 1, 2026

Useful invoicing

Invoices are easy to send and reminders save me time every week.

February 2, 2026

Bank sync breaks

The bank feed disconnects often and reconciliation takes longer than it should.

February 3, 2026

Good accountant access

My accountant can log in and fix reports without sending files back and forth.

February 4, 2026

Migration was confusing

Moving from desktop worked eventually, but the import messages were hard to understand.

February 5, 2026
